name: agentspec_hash
description: Compute content-addressable hash (ag1:xxx) of an agent manifest. Deterministic — same manifest always produces the same hash.
implementation: import sys,json;sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/agentspec/src');from agentspec.parser.manifest import AgentManifest;from agentspec.parser.loader import agent_hash;d=json.load(sys.stdin);m=AgentManifest(**d['manifest']);print(json.dumps({'hash':agent_hash(m),'name':m.name,'version':m.version}))
